name: 強制綁架/按住抽血
description: 女主被強行帶到醫院綁住抽血，這種暴力性的肢體控制行為製造了極強的壓迫感和觀眾的保護慾，為男主的英雄救美做鋪墊。
tags: 被綑綁在病床上的無助畫面與針管抽血的醫療恐懼相結合

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Your mother brought you to the hospital to draw blood. Miss Sharp, please cooperate with us. ... The patient is too weak. We cannot draw any more blood.
examples.context: 被綑綁在病床上的無助畫面與針管抽血的醫療恐懼相結合
